name: SiriusPoint Ltd. 8.00% Resettable Fixed Rate Preference Shares Series B $25.00 liquidation preference per share
summary: SiriusPoint Ltd. is a global insurance and reinsurance company that provides a range of specialty insurance and reinsurance products. The 8.00% Resettable Fixed Rate Preference Shares Series B represent a form of preferred equity in the company, paying a fixed dividend. SiriusPoint Ltd. is headquartered in Pembroke, Bermuda.
